news.headline: Mexico refrains from retaliating with tariffs as Sheinbaum hopes for US deal.

Merck plans to submit two-drug HIV regime for regulatory approval by mid-2025 after positive Phase 3 trial results.Key numbers: 2 Phase 3 trials, doravirine/islatravir (DOR/ISL), Week 48 data release.
news.summary: Merck & Co Inc (NYSE: MRK) recently shared the outcomes of two Phase 3 trials involving doravirine/islatravir (DOR/ISL) in adults with HIV-1 infection who were already virologically suppressed either on bictegravir/emtricitabine/tenofovir alafenamide (BIC/FTC/TAF) in trial MK-8591A-052 or receiving antiretroviral therapy (bART) in trial MK-8591A-051. The trials demonstrated that DOR/ISL achieved the primary efficacy success criterion for non-inferiority compared to existing antiretroviral therapies and met the primary safety objectives by Week 48. Merck & Co Inc revealed the top-line data from both studies.

news.headline: Global Baby Bottle Warmers and Sterilizers Market valued at US$173.9M in 2024, projected to reach US$206.0M by 2030 with 2.9% CAGR - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin - A report titled "Baby Bottle Warmers and Sterilizers - Global Strategic Business Report" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for Baby Bottle Warmers and Sterilizers was valued at US$173.9 million in 2024 and is anticipated to hit US$206.0 million by 2030, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 2.9% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report presents a thorough examination of market trends, factors driving growth, and projections, enabling informed decision-making in business operations.

news.headline: CTIA names Ajit Pai as new CEO and President starting April 1, 2025, coming from Searchlight Capital Partners.
news.summary: Ajit Pai has been appointed as the President and Chief Executive Officer of CTIA, the wireless industry association, starting from April 1, 2025. Previously associated with Searchlight Capital Partners, a prominent private investment firm, Pai will assume this new role. This announcement was made by CTIA on March 12, 2025.

Gary Steele, an experienced tech executive, was appointed to lead the company towards its next stage of expansion. This move signifies Shield AI's commitment to further advancement in the industry.

news.headline: Law firm Ropes & Gray expands into Paris with 3 new partners, forming a European hub along with London.
news.summary: Ropes & Gray, a renowned global law firm, has unveiled a new office in Paris, France, marking a significant expansion for the firm. This move also establishes a European base for Ropes & Gray when combined with its existing London office. Fabrice Cohen, Thierry Arachtingi, and Emmanuel Mimin are among the notable individuals who have joined the firm in this endeavor. The opening of this Paris office strengthens the firm's presence in the region as it continues to expand its operations.

news.summary: In Berkeley, California, on March 12, 2025, it was stated that a concerning scenario was presented, where individuals were asked to picture a situation where filling up a car's gas tank led to 40% of the fuel leaking out before the vehicle was even used. This analogy was used to highlight the issue faced by farmers.

news.headline: HYPE token falls after leveraged trade causes $4M loss for Hyperliquid, following a trader's $285M Ethereum bet.
news.summary: A trader made a $285 million investment in Ethereum on a decentralized exchange, resulting in $4 million in losses for the exchange.

news.headline: Binance enhances token review with metrics like liquidity, trading volume; total new coins at 12.5M. Coinbase also rethinking listing process amid huge influx of tokens.
news.summary: Binance's Alpha platform has introduced a new token review framework targeting underperforming tokens, assessing criteria like trading stability and team credibility. Within Binance Alpha, coins have a cumulative $6.4 billion market cap, a 24-hour increase of 3.7%, and a $1.4 billion trading volume. The rise in tokens has led to exchanges like Binance and Coinbase redesigning their listing processes, given the mushrooming number of coins - from 10 million three years ago to 12.5 million now. Binance's new community vote system lets users influence coin listings. Coinbase is also revising its listing procedures due to the significant rise in token creation, as CEO Brian Armstrong calls for a shift to a block list approach. The memecoin trend, which saw daily launches of over 40,000 coins on Solana, is slowing down, with new launches on Pump.fun dropping by 80% since February 27.

news.headline: Nvidia stock rebounds, seeking true recovery with notable gains.
TIGA Games Education Conference returns for 2025 at Birmingham City University, discussing games education. March 12, 2025.
news.summary: On Thursday, July 3rd, developers and educators are scheduled to convene at Birmingham City University to address games education. TIGA, the UK video games industry's trade association, disclosed that its Games Education Conference is set to make a comeback. The conference will take place in London on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Hunt Capital Partners transfers ownership of 76-unit senior affordable housing community to El Paso's Housing Authority.
news.summary: In El Paso, Texas, Hunt Capital Partners has completed the transfer of ownership of a senior affordable housing property in the Segundo Barrio area to the public housing authority. This move signifies a significant shift in property ownership, aimed at ensuring the availability of affordable housing for seniors in the region. This transfer aligns with efforts to address the growing need for affordable housing options, particularly for seniors, in El Paso. The property's transfer to the public housing authority demonstrates a commitment to supporting affordable housing initiatives and addressing housing challenges faced by the senior population. This strategic decision underscores the importance of collaborations between private entities and public agencies to enhance the availability of affordable housing options.

The innovative platform operates on data-centric zero-trust principles, providing organizations with advanced security measures for safeguarding their data. This new product aims to enhance security and offers organizations a comprehensive solution for managing their data protection needs.

Consumer Watchdog urges CA Senators to pledge to leave office if their vote for SB 540 causes FERC to invalidate clean energy laws.
news.summary: Today, Consumer Watchdog informed California State Senators about potential risks associated with SB 540 (Becker), a proposal aiming to establish a Western regional grid. The organization cautioned that this legislation may result in the circumvention of crucial state environmental regulations, such as those pertaining to the Renewal Portfolio. It is essential for legislators to consider the implications carefully before proceeding with the bill.

news.headline: DOGE DEI slashes millions in affordable housing contracts in major purge.
news.summary: A new research study revealed that over 75% of adults surveyed believe stress has a major impact on their physical health, with 64% stating it affects their mental health. The study, conducted among 2,000 adults aged 18 and above, also found that 82% of respondents reported feeling stressed at least once a week, with the main sources of stress being work, finances, and relationships. Additionally, 46% of those surveyed admitted they do not feel comfortable discussing their stress levels with others. The study highlights the pervasive influence of stress on the population's well-being and the need for open conversations about mental health.

It is further segmented by application into Industrial, Residential, and Commercial sectors. news.headline: Equilibrium Energy secures $28M funding for EQ Mission Control™ software to enhance power portfolio management.

The company also introduced its primary software product, EQ Mission ControlTM. GS Energy led the investment round, with contributions from NRG Energy and various new and current investors. news.headline: Econolite to deploy Lidar traffic signal system in Utah with Ouster's 3D digital Lidar and BlueCity platform to improve traffic flow. #UDOT #Utah
news.summary: Today, Econolite, a part of Umovity and a leading provider of comprehensive traffic management solutions, revealed that it has secured a contract from the Utah Department of Transportation (UDOT). The contract entails the implementation of advanced lidar-based traffic signal detection systems across Utah. Econolite will leverage Ouster’s cutting-edge 3D digital lidar technology alongside Ouster BlueCity, an all-in-one traffic management platform designed for intelligent signal actuation and data analysis. This initiative aims to improve traffic efficiency in the state.

news.headline: US auto dealers feel more optimistic with CADSI at 44 in Q1 2025, up from 42 in Q4 2024. Despite weak profits, costs rising.
news.summary: In Atlanta on March 12, 2025, the Q1 2025 Cox Automotive Dealer Sentiment Index (CADSI) revealed that U.S. automobile dealers' perception of current market conditions rose from an index score of 42 in Q4 2024 to 44 in Q1 2025. The survey conducted in late January and early February showed this improvement.
